arts.ttl: Leon Goretzka getting chance to show Bayern Munich staff he belongs
arts.sum: Of course I’m happy when that’s acknowledged. Bayern munich midfielder Leon Goretzka has not had the easiest of seasons.

arts.ttl: Marquinhos says PSG was victim in loss to Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain dropped a 1-0 decision to Bayern Munich and Marquinhos thinks it had a whole lot to do with the treatment that the French club received from the referee. Regardless, Bayern Munich picked up the win and PSG can only lament what might have been.

arts.ttl: PSG, Tottenham Summer Target Needs Bold Approach to Secure Barcelona Move

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany says Bayern Munich wasn’t fooled by PSG’s bag of tricks
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany downplayed his team’s need for a big, signature win in the pregame press conference prior to the German giant’s 1-0 victory over Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League . Hopefully it will look good when we win a few more games.

arts.ttl: French newspaper L'Equipe claim PSG 'no longer exist in Europe' after falling to 1-0 defeat by Bayern Munich - with Luis Enrique's side winning just one out of their first five Champions League games
arts.sum: Luis Enrique's side suffered a 1-0 defeat in their visit to the Allianz Arena on Tuesday night, with Kim Min-Jae's strike the only difference between the two sides.

arts.ttl: Four observations from Bayern Munich’s nailbiting 1-0 win over PSG
arts.sum: Bayern Munich earned a badly needed win in the Champions League. It is times like this when a lack of depth can cost teams matches, but Bayern’s depth paid off when players like Laimer and Goretzka can step in.
